title: A Priority-Aware Replanning and Resequencing Framework for Coordination of Connected and Automated Vehicles
method_family: Priority-aware resequencing + decentralized optimal control / 优先级重排序与分散最优控制
concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。
优先级重排序与分散最优控制

section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. M ODELING FRAMEWORK
section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: III. A PRIORITY-AWARE RESEQUENCING
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: IV. SIMULATION RESULTS
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

section_map.heading: V. CONCLUDING REMARKS AND DISCUSSION
section_map.zh: 总结贡献和未来方向，也常暴露作者承认的边界条件。
section_map.en: Summarizes contributions and often reveals author-recognized boundaries.

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Scheduling/resequencing + optimal control：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. M ODELING FRAMEWORK
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 高层监测车辆进入、延误和可行性破坏；当扰动出现时，按照优先级规则更新局部通行序列，再把目标离开时间传给每辆车的解析/数值最优控制器。低层控制器检查速度、加速度、追尾和横向冲突约束是否可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. A PRIORITY-AWARE RESEQUENCING
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: IV. SIMULATION RESULTS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Numerical simulation of signal-free intersection coordination under resequencing and replanning.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：通行时间 (travel time)、延误 (delay)、停止次数 (number of stops)、控制能量代理 (control effort) 和安全约束违反。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. CONCLUDING REMARKS AND DISCUSSION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 提炼作者承认的边界，并把它转化为博士课题的可拓展问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Convert acknowledged boundaries into research opportunities.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 结论不只是总结结果，更是观察作者没有解决什么的窗口。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把 future work 与前文假设逐一对应，寻找可发表的补强点。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 如果我是审稿人，我会要求补哪一个实验、定理或消融？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：当车辆到达扰动使原始通行序列不再高效或可行时，如何在不牺牲安全约束的前提下快速重排序并生成可执行轨迹？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：所有车辆为联网自动驾驶车辆 (connected automated vehicles, CAVs)，且路径已知。；车辆动力学可由简化双积分模型 (double-integrator model) 充分描述。；通信、定位和控制执行误差较小，扰动可被及时探测。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“双积分车辆模型与能量型最优控制 / Double-integrator vehicle model with energy-like optimal control”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Event-driven replanning and priority-aware resequencing layered on decentralized CAV optimal control at a signal-free intersection.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Numerical simulation of signal-free intersection coordination under resequencing and replanning.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Directly supports this project's hierarchy: a high-level sequence or schedule provides target times, and a low-level controller checks executable motion.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
双积分车辆模型与能量型最优控制 / Double-integrator vehicle model with energy-like optimal control
Event-driven replanning and priority-aware resequencing layered on decentralized CAV optimal control at a signal-free intersection.
Uses rear-end and lateral safety constraints around conflict points, with replanning when disturbances change feasibility.
The lower-level optimal-control trajectory is constructed so vehicles can conserve momentum rather than stop at the intersection when a feasible exit time exists.
Numerical simulation of signal-free intersection coordination under resequencing and replanning.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Directly supports this project's hierarchy: a high-level sequence or schedule provides target times, and a low-level controller checks executable motion.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：双积分车辆模型与能量型最优控制 / Double-integrator vehicle model with energy-like optimal control，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Scheduling/resequencing + optimal control”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Scheduling/resequencing + optimal control. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Assumes connected automated vehicles, known paths, and simplified dynamics; the paper is closer to resequencing theory than to learned graph scheduling.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 当车辆到达扰动使原始通行序列不再高效或可行时，如何在不牺牲安全约束的前提下快速重排序并生成可执行轨迹？
overview.core_question_en: How can an intersection manager resequence disturbed arrivals while preserving safety and low-level trajectory feasibility?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Event-driven replanning and priority-aware resequencing layered on decentralized CAV optimal control at a signal-free intersection.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Uses rear-end and lateral safety constraints around conflict points, with replanning when disturbances change feasibility.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：The lower-level optimal-control trajectory is constructed so vehicles can conserve momentum rather than stop at the intersection when a feasible exit time exists.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：强相关但中等创新：把 resequencing 明确嵌入 CAV 最优控制闭环，贡献主要在系统架构和事件触发逻辑。

methodology.model_name: 双积分车辆模型与能量型最优控制 / Double-integrator vehicle model with energy-like optimal control
symbols: 把多车协调拆成单车最优控制子问题
描述车辆是否接近/离开冲突区
连接安全间距、通行时间与停止避免
优化变量，平滑性和能耗代理
高层排序传给低层控制器的关键接口
methodology.algorithm_zh: 高层监测车辆进入、延误和可行性破坏；当扰动出现时，按照优先级规则更新局部通行序列，再把目标离开时间传给每辆车的解析/数值最优控制器。低层控制器检查速度、加速度、追尾和横向冲突约束是否可执行。
methodology.algorithm_en: The upper layer detects event-triggered infeasibility, resequences vehicles under priority rules, and sends target exit times to decentralized optimal controllers that enforce motion and safety constraints.
methodology.stability_zh: 实时性来自局部事件触发与低维车辆模型；安全性依赖硬约束而非学习策略。它不证明全局最优，但把全局重排问题约束在小窗口内，适合在线运行。
methodology.stability_en: Real-time behavior comes from event-triggered local resequencing and low-dimensional dynamics; safety is constraint-based, while global optimality is intentionally relaxed.
assumptions: 所有车辆为联网自动驾驶车辆 (connected automated vehicles, CAVs)，且路径已知。
车辆动力学可由简化双积分模型 (double-integrator model) 充分描述。
通信、定位和控制执行误差较小，扰动可被及时探测。

experiments.validation: Numerical simulation of signal-free intersection coordination under resequencing and replanning.
experiments.baselines: 通常与固定先来先服务/不重排序 (FCFS / no resequencing) 策略比较，重点观察扰动后恢复效率。
experiments.metrics: 通行时间 (travel time)、延误 (delay)、停止次数 (number of stops)、控制能量代理 (control effort) 和安全约束违反。
experiments.ablation: 论文更像机制验证而非完整消融；最应补充的是关闭优先级、关闭事件触发和扩大重排窗口的对比。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。

figure_table_cues.zh: 冲突关系图 / 通行顺序图
figure_table_cues.reading: 把节点、边类型和先后约束翻译成 JSSP 的作业、机器和析取约束。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 对全 CAV 环境依赖强，混合交通中人类驾驶车辆 (HDVs) 会破坏可行性假设。
优先级规则可能引入公平性问题，长期低优先级车流需要饥饿避免机制。
简化动力学忽略执行器延迟、轮胎约束和感知误差累积。
extensions: 把固定优先级扩展为学习型优先级函数 (learned priority function)，并加入公平性正则。
将重排序窗口映射为 JSSP machine queue，用图神经网络 (GNN) 预测候选交换收益。
在低层加入鲁棒 MPC 或 CBF 安全过滤器，处理通信延迟和轨迹预测误差。
critique.project_use: Directly supports this project's hierarchy: a high-level sequence or schedule provides target times, and a low-level controller checks executable motion.

interactive.response_zh: 窗口增大通常降低延误但提高计算量，并可能增加局部公平性风险。
interactive.response_en: A larger window usually reduces delay but increases computation and fairness risk.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
